spells.description: Kasreth zaps the player, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage.
spells.name: Arcane Zap

spells.coaching_note: Charges a random player with a stacking Arcane DoT (heavy damage if left to tick) — the charged player runs into a Leyline Array conduit to make the circuit recoil and clear it (brief self-stun).
spells.description:
Kasreth hurls a refluxing circuit on a random player inflicting $1282915s1 Arcane damage every $1251772t1 sec. 
Provides immunity while standing in $@spellname1251626 as the circuit recoils and clears the effect, stunning the player for $1257836d.
spells.name: Reflux Charge

spells.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, Kasreth overcharges a spark in the core engine and launches it at a random location, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage to all players within $A1 yards of the impact. The detonation causes a $@spellname1264040, leaving behind $@spellname1264042s, and $@spellname1276485 clings to all players.
spells.name: Corespark Detonation

spells.description: Broken pipes leak excess power, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage to enemies within $a1 yards of the impact. Causes an $@spellname1264042 to form for $d.
spells.name: Flux Collapse

spells.coaching_note: Residual arcane energy pools on the ground — move out; it ticks Arcane to anyone standing within.
spells.description: Residual arcane energy lingers on the ground, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage every $t1 sec to players standing within.
spells.name: Arcane Spill

spells.description: An arcane discharge clings to players absorbing the next $s1 healing and inflicts $s2 Arcane damage every $t2 sec.
spells.name: Sparkburn

spells.description:
Lothraxion unleashes radiant swarms toward several players, blasting players within $1255503A1 yards of the impact for $1255503s1 Holy damage and searing an additional $1255503s2 Holy damage every $1255503t2 sec for $1255503d. 
Fractured Images scatter, erupting with $@spellname1282791 to enemies within $1282791A1 yards of their creation.
spells.name: Brilliant Dispersion

spells.coaching_note: Lothraxion's double-slash on his current target carves a Radiant Scar into the ground — move off the scar it leaves (a Holy DoT zone).
spells.description: Lothraxion lashes out with a precise, double-slash aimed at his current target, with each strike inflicting $1255208s1 Physical damage and an additional $1255335s1 Holy damage every $1255335t1 sec for $1255335d. Carves $@spellname1255310s into the ground.
spells.name: Searing Rend

spells.coaching_note: The ground brand left by Searing Rend — Holy ticks to anyone within; move out of it.
spells.description: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts $s1 Holy damage every $t1 sec to players within the area.
spells.name: Radiant Scar

spells.coaching_note: Energy-gated (100 energy): Lothraxion hides among his Fractured Images and channels Holy damage into the core until interrupted — find the real Lothraxion and interrupt him to stop it.
spells.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, Lothraxion disguises himself amongst his Fractured Images as they all channel light energy into the core, inflicting $s1 Holy damage every $1257595t2 sec until Lothraxion is interrupted.
spells.name: Divine Guile

spells.coaching_note: Unavoidable AoE from a failed avoidable mechanic — prevent by handling that mechanic; heal through if it lands. Also exposes the party to +20% Holy damage taken, so Lothraxion's next Holy hit lands amplified.
spells.description: Inflicts $s1 Holy damage to all players and increases Holy damage taken by $s2% for $d.
spells.name: Core Exposure

spells.description: Coming in contact with a Fractured Image rends the target, knocking them away and inflicting $1269220s1 Holy damage with an additional $1271956s1 Holy damage every $1271956t1 sec. This effect stacks and leaves behind $@spellname1255389s.
spells.name: Mirrored Rend

spells.description: Lashes out with a precise, double-slash aimed at his current target. Each strike inflicts $1257736s1 Physical damage with an additional $1257745s1 Holy damage every $1257745t1 sec for $1257745d to any enemies within range and carves a $@spellname1255310 into the ground.
spells.name: Searing Rend
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=300,849, 406 applies, ~1.0 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts $s1 Holy damage every $t1 sec to players within the area.
spells.name: Radiant Scar
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=229,924, 864 applies, ~1.0 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Unleashes a swarm of dazzling light, inflicting $s1 Holy damage to all enemies in front of the caster and blinding them for $d.
spells.name: Luciferin Flare
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=301,418, 23 applies, ~1.4 tgt. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.coaching_note: DoT applied by the Lingering Image adds — kill the add or heal it off.
spells.name: Blistering Smite

spells.description: Imbues a target with a rerouting essence causing all incoming healing received by the target to be redirected to the caster.
spells.name: Transference
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured 454 applies. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.name: Arcane Zap
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured max=257,647, ~1.0 tgt. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Inflicts $s1 Arcane damage to all enemies every $1285445t1 sec.
spells.name: Arcane Explosion
spells.notes: interruptible_observed measured from WCL (find-casts): 63 interrupts across recent S1 logs by Mind Freeze/Quell/Rebuke/Counter Shot/Skull Bash/Disrupt/Muzzle/Avenger's Shield/Axe Toss. DB2 InterruptFlags=0 is stale for this scripted channel; kick-timing can't capture it (0-cast channel → no begincast to pair → no kick-point). is_channeled is DB2-derived (Attributes_1 0x40 self-channel bit; tooltip: 'Channeled, 12 sec').

spells.description: Places a suppression field on an enemy, decreasing movement by $s1% and pulsing out $1282950s1 Arcane damage every $s2 sec for $d. Additionally, if the enemy moves while being suppressed, they explode, inflicting $1269286s1 Arcane damage to themselves and all allies within $1269286A1 yards.
spells.name: Suppression Field

spells.description: The caster arcs beams of energy at players for $d, inflicting $1249806s1 Arcane damage every $1249806t1 sec. This effect stacks.
spells.name: Arcing Mana
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=109,506, 11,064 applies, ~4.7 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Energy surges off the caster inflicting $s1 Arcane damage to enemies within $A1 yards of the surge.
spells.name: Erratic Surge
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=49,929, ~1.3 tgt. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: Chaotic energies surge into the ground, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage to players within $a1 yards of the impact and stunning them for $d.
spells.name: Erratic Zap

spells.description: A concussive strike dismounts the target and reduces movement speed by $s1% for $d.
spells.name: Dazed
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured 1 applies. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.coaching_note: Smudges are released adds that funnel essence into a Nascent Dreadflail (Forfeit Essence) to charge it — kill them before they reach one; if they fully charge it, the Dreadflail activates.
spells.description: Funnels health into an ally.
spells.name: Forfeit Essence
spells.notes: priority+coaching EDITORIAL (user 2026-06-25, no measured data): Smudges are released adds; Forfeit Essence "funnels health into an ally" — they charge a Nascent Dreadflail toward activation. Answer is to kill the Smudges before they reach one.

spells.description: The Grand Nullifier conjures a blast of void energy at the target, inflicting $s1 Shadow damage.
spells.name: Nullify

spells.description: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts $s1 Holy damage every $t1 sec to players within the area.
spells.name: Radiant Scar
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=120,646, 57 applies, ~1.0 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.name: Mirrored Rend

spells.name: Dusk Frights
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): RECOVERED (no Casts event). measured 18 applies. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description: The battery overloads and explodes inflicting $1257126s1 Arcane damage every $1257126t1 sec for $1257126d.
spells.name: Corespark Overload
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=223,906, 75 applies, ~3.8 tgt, DoT. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.description:
The conduit expels excess power, inflicting $s1 Arcane damage to enemies within $A1 yards of the surge.

Standing on the conduit redirects the surge into the target and nearby allies, empowering them but inflicting $1257091s1 Arcane damage every $1257091t1 sec. This effect stacks.
spells.name: Corespark Surge
spells.notes: spell-audit (2026-06-25): uncurated (scraped keep:false). measured max=129,723, 34 applies. add priority + danger flags in-game.

spells.coaching_note: Inactive until Smudges charge it (their Forfeit Essence funnels essence in) — at full charge it Coalesces into an active Dreadflail you must kill before moving on. Stop the Smudges to prevent it.
spells.description: The void coalesces into a new lieutenant.
spells.name: Coalescence
spells.notes: priority+coaching EDITORIAL (user 2026-06-25, no measured data): a Nascent Dreadflail charged to full by Smudges Coalesces ("the void coalesces into a new lieutenant") into an active Dreadflail that must be killed before moving on.

spells.coaching_note: Nysarra leaps to her current tank and rapid-slashes them, ending with Void Gash — a knockback that amplifies their damage taken. Tank-only: mitigate through it and brace for the knockback; an ally external helps if it's landing hard.
spells.description: Nysarra leaps to her primary target and unleashes consecutive slashes on them, inflicting $1248007s1 Shadow damage with every strike and causing $@spellname1252828 on the final one.
spells.name: Umbral Lash

spells.description:
A fractured image of Lothraxion strikes at Nysarra, causing her wound to flare and stunning her for $d. Players caught in the image's blast suffer $1265984s1 Holy damage and are disoriented for $1265984d.

Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by $1247975s3% and damage dealt to Nysarra by $1247975s2% but inflicts $1271433s1 Holy damage every $1271433t1 sec until she recovers.
spells.name: Lightscar Flare

spells.description: Nysarra slips into the shadows and strikes at random players, inflicting $1252875s1 Shadow damage and additional $1252875s2 Shadow damage every $1252875t2 sec for $1252875d to all players within $1252875a2 yards.
spells.name: Eclipsing Step

spells.description: Remnants of Nysarra's shattered command rise to defend and suppress.
spells.name: Null Vanguard

spells.description: Gashes the player, knocking them back and increasing all damage taken by $s1% for $d.
spells.name: Void Gash

spells.coaching_note: Nysarra channels to devour her surviving adds and heal herself, then bursts the party with void energy. Kill the adds before this so there's nothing to consume, and be topped for the burst.
spells.description: Nyssara channels the void to consume any surviving subordinates, restoring her own strength every $t1 sec for $d and triggers a burst of void energy inflicting $1257980s1 Shadow damage to all players.
spells.name: Devour the Unworthy
spells.notes: priority+is_aoe+unavoidable+party_targets EDITORIAL (2026-06-25, measured danger pass): the channel's burst (impact 1257980) hits the WHOLE party — tooltip 'Shadow damage to all players' + measured party_wide 5/5 (observed-targeting), avg ~190k / max 370k over 5 hits (observed-danger). Promoted reference→priority so the heal/survive line surfaces (reference casts are excluded from threats). is_lethal LEFT FALSE: single report (reports:1), 370k max is heavy chip not a clean one-shot at the sampled key — re-check at higher keys. CAVEAT: measured records are attributed to npc 'Dreadflail' (251024), a likely WCL source-resolution artifact (ability name unique; tooltip names Nyssara; Dreadflail's candidate list lacks it) — confirm before fully trusting the numbers.

spells.description: Wounded by Lothraxion, Nysarra begins the encounter at $s1% health. Fractured Images periodically tear into the arena, causing $@spellname1247976.
